transport_dispatch_paths.r2_policy: central exact allowlist required before registry lookup and execution

transport_dispatch_paths.current_reality: method names present in the tool registry can call _call_tool
route checks visible tool names before _call_tool

transport_dispatch_paths.r2_policy: same central exact allowlist; no internal bypass
not configured for isolated Canary and still covered by central deny

transport_dispatch_paths.current_reality: resolves a registered project and invokes routed tool callable
transport_dispatch_paths.r2_policy: one exact project only; route and callable both checked against allowlist

transport_dispatch_paths.path: Web Console and other local adapters
transport_dispatch_paths.current_reality: may call agent/server tools in process
transport_dispatch_paths.r2_policy: not composed into the Canary endpoint; central deny remains effective if accidentally reached

non_mcp_and_control_plane_paths.activation_policy: authoritative writes denied unless the exact attested active Lease and sealed Token-authenticated request context are present; PrincipalContext alone is insufficient

non_mcp_and_control_plane_paths.path: Bearer Token HTTP handler to AuthoritativeCanaryRequestContext
non_mcp_and_control_plane_paths.activation_policy: only a correct private Token after persisted Listener attestation may mint the non-JSON sealed context; context is bound to lease ID, authorization digest, process identity, runtime nonce, Principal/session and listener-attestation digest

non_mcp_and_control_plane_paths.path: one-shot activation envelope and prepared Lease claim
non_mcp_and_control_plane_paths.activation_policy: listener-free waiting process first emits a fresh schema-valid Preflight and expected process identity; control plane atomically writes/fsyncs the 0600 Envelope then inserts the prepared Lease and lease_issued Event transactionally; no prepared Lease may exist without its durable Envelope; Envelope is atomically moved with no replacement and parent fsynced; prepared becomes claimed before bind and active only after persisted Listener attestation; orphan or failed/crashed claims are not reusable

receipt validates against the frozen Preflight Schema with format assertions; exact receipt/baseline/backup, executable/CWD/settings/Token/Envelope/Fixture/Ledger/Backup path digests and Linux process-identity inputs are bound to Lease; maximum age 120 seconds; zero baseline rechecked in claim transaction
same Principal, attested Lease and sealed Token-authenticated request context as MCP; direct call with a valid Lease and Principal but no request capability is denied

non_mcp_and_control_plane_paths.path: synthetic Fixture normalization and generated-ID binding
non_mcp_and_control_plane_paths.activation_policy: every Preview/write matches the frozen Fixture Schema and exact Lease-bound canonical Fixture; command slots, Runtime Attempt objectives, Decision actions, lifecycle transitions, Artifact policy and empty external/Plan references agree under semantic cross-field validation; typed generated IDs bind atomically; real references are denied
not exported to Canary callers; exact composition and architecture tests prohibit external mutation
only exact forward startup schema before Lease activation; denied while active
key must be provisioned before activation; active runtime reads existing key and fails closed if absent

non_mcp_and_control_plane_paths.mutation_kind: external backup-file write and Ledger read lock
non_mcp_and_control_plane_paths.activation_policy: control plane only before or after activation; absent from endpoint
denied from Lease preparation through closeout; requires a later maintenance authorization
read-only control plane after write freeze; absent from endpoint
not exposed; separate control plane only; never a substitute for synchronous Lease enforcement
mandatory after endpoint stop or terminal Lease; old Token authentication must fail

every row validates against the frozen Lease Event Schema, exact event-type lifecycle edge, contiguous state-version rule and hash chain; includes issue, process claim, post-bind listener attestation and closeout; command events bind request context, source key, Principal and fact delta; at most one event per newly committed command, zero on exact replay, one deduplicated hard-freeze event, maximum 40 total; sanitized snapshot and Event exports make closeout roots independently recomputable

non_mcp_and_control_plane_paths.path: Stable Promotion, App Submission, Git, Files, Project, Executor, Product or Operations command
non_mcp_and_control_plane_paths.activation_policy: not registered and central dispatch denied
not composed or started; Gate-generated Outbox rows remain pending evidence

read_and_preview_policy.path: five frozen Work Item Read tools
read_and_preview_policy.policy: token-authenticated; remain available after Lease freeze for closeout
active Lease, exact Principal/project/scope and existing signing key required; unavailable after expiry
